creator: zarinos@hotmail.com
text:
Memtest+ is still running with 0 errors (14h25m, 6 fully passed tests).

I can also report that other operating systems (especially Windows that are totally unrelated) had no problem running continuously for same or greater time spans in the past, although some system parameters may have change (disks, BIOS settings). 

Do you think there is something more I could try so we can further troubleshoot?
